name: Astral Maze: Escape The Horror
short_description: "Astral Maze: Escape the Horror" is a first-person horror game. Be attentive and careful, enemies may chase you. Look for the keys and find a way out of the maze.
detailed_description:
EXPLORE THE CURSED MAZE

Immerse yourself in a nightmarish labyrinth inhabited by a ruthless demon-like creature, eager to take your soul. Can you outsmart him and find your way to freedom, or will you become another lost soul, forever trapped in the Astral Labyrinth?

To survive, you must become one with the shadows. Remain unnoticed, remain calm, and avoid direct confrontation at all costs.

Average time to complete the game is 30 minutes

Game Features:

-Walking simulator

-Ability to strike an enemy with a flashlight flash

Update 1.2.0
Added new maps
improved AI
fixed bug
visualization of the maze

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Russian, Japanese, Uzbek
